summary: Monster pacing is acceptable: the min route uses skeletons at [6,11], [3,7], [5,2] plus zombie [3,4] as real costs, while optional center/right branches use redPriest, bigBat, and slimelord placements to guard stronger rewards. No zone/repulse sources are present, so there is no decorative or uncompensated zone/repulse damage.
